small.name: Typical Community Recreation Center
small.notes: Single gym, fitness room, multipurpose room, locker rooms, small office

medium.name: Livestrong YMCA
medium.notes: Natatorium, gymnasium, fitness center, indoor track, group exercise, childcare

large.name: Lifetime Fitness (typical large-format)
large.notes: Full-service fitness campus; indoor/outdoor pools; basketball courts; spa; cafe; childcare

space_library.name: Lobby / Welcome Center
notes: Membership check-in; access control turnstile; sightline to major amenities; trophy display

space_library.name: Front Desk / Control Point
notes: Sightlines to entry, pool, gym; POS/membership system; towel service

space_library.name: Gymnasium (Basketball/Volleyball)
notes: HS regulation court 84x50 ft (5,040 SF min with run-out); 24 ft clear min; maple or synthetic floor; divider curtain for double courts; spectator seating optional

space_library.name: Fitness Floor (Cardio + Weights)
notes: 40-50 SF per station; rubber flooring; high ceilings for functional training; separate free-weight zone from cardio; mirrors; supplemental cooling

space_library.name: Group Exercise / Studio
notes: 30-40 SF/person; sprung floor; mirror wall; sound system; equipment storage adjacent; cycling studio may be separate

space_library.name: Indoor Pool / Natatorium
notes: 25-yard competition pool 13,500 SF with deck; leisure pool separate; 84F air temp, 82F water; dehumidification critical; separate HVAC zone; corrosion-resistant materials; lifeguard station

space_library.name: Pool Mechanical / Chemical Storage
notes: Below or adjacent to pool; filtration, chemical treatment, surge tank; ventilated chemical storage; direct exterior access for chemical delivery

space_library.name: Lifeguard / Pool Office
notes: Visual to pool deck; first aid kit; AED; rescue equipment storage

space_library.name: Indoor Running Track
notes: Elevated track above gym typical; 1/8 mile = 660 ft, 1/10 mile = 528 ft; 8 ft wide min with passing lane; banked turns; rubber surface

space_library.name: Multipurpose Room
notes: Community meetings, birthday parties, senior programs; divisible; kitchenette access; AV

space_library.name: Childcare / Kids Zone
notes: 35 SF/child; age-separated; parent check-in/out; dedicated toilet; visual monitoring; near entry for parent convenience

space_library.name: Men's Locker Room
notes: 12-15 SF/locker; showers; sauna/steam optional; vanity area; family changing room separate; between dry and wet zones

space_library.name: Women's Locker Room
notes: Same as men's; additional vanity; typically 10-15% larger than men's for privacy

space_library.name: Administrative Offices
notes: Director, program coordinator, membership; staff break area

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: Near multipurpose room and lobby for spectators; family restroom

space_library.name: Equipment Storage
notes: Balls, mats, weights, nets; adjacent to gym and group exercise; rolling storage

space_library.name: Mechanical Room
notes: Dedicated pool dehumidification; high ventilation for locker rooms; domestic hot water for showers

space_library.name: Electrical Room
notes: Emergency power for pool circulation; lighting controls for gym courts

plan_archetypes.notes: Shed for gymnasium/natatorium; support bar for locker rooms and offices
